name: communications-marketplace
description: Multi-agent presentation system for NBG corporate communications. Create McKinsey-quality, board-ready presentations following NBG brand guidelines using a coordinated agent pipeline.

nbg-presenter.description: Master orchestrator for NBG presentations. Coordinates all specialist agents.

storyline-architect.description: Creates narrative structure using Pyramid Principle and SCQA framework.

storyboard-designer.description: Designs visual layouts with exact positioning for each slide.

graphics-renderer.description: Assembles pixel-perfect PPTX files using PptxGenJS.

infographic-specialist.description: Creates charts, diagrams, KPI dashboards, and data visualizations.

icon-designer.description: Generates NBG-compliant SVG icons with solid fills.

brand.description: Single source of truth for NBG brand specifications.
